mapper.insert: insert into event_instances ( event_instance_id, company_id, event_template_id, event_at, source_type, source_department_ids, source_user_ids, participant_user_ids, status, notified_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{eventInstanceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eventTemplateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eventAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CAST(#{sourceDepartmentIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), CAST(#{sourceUserIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), CAST(#{participantUserIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{notifiedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
